description: Composition Grey hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a round neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed hem, brand badge, and applique with graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print Every style maven's wardrobe must have an off-duty essential like this blue batman jersey from bioworld. Pair this with distressed jeans and arty sneakers to complete your functional yet fashionable look. Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 18
